name: shadcn-foundation-pattern
description: shadcn/ui foundation already established with correct patterns: components.json (new-york style), lib/utils.ts with cn() helper, @/ path alias in tsconfig and vite. Button component demonstrates correct pattern.
relevantCode: export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)) }
recommendation: Use Button component as template for adding more components (Card, Input, Dialog, etc.)
